summary: Created 5 anti-pattern knowledge pack files covering common traps: over-engineering day 1, skipping level 1, no bio/memory, agent sprawl, and skipping verification. Each file follows diagnose → why it happens → fix structure with practical examples and one-liners to give Zo.
learnings: Anti-pattern detection works best with concrete symptoms callers exhibit rather than abstract concepts
The 'one line to say to Zo' format gives hotline operators practical tools for immediate intervention
Character limits force precision in both diagnosis and solution
